title: Drop indices crashes server
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id Int32, name String, value Nullable(Decimal(10,2)));
INSERT INTO t1(id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.50);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE value IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD INDEX idx_value (value) TYPE minmax;
key_bug_features: Dropping an index causes server crash
